codeReview.summary: The fix improves CTA actionability by tapping error-state buttons and asserting callbacks, but it still does not provide the required actionable UI-level propagation and launch-chain evidence. Relative to the original failed feature, this closes the CTA-presence gap but leaves key blocking coverage gaps unresolved.

issues.description: Settings→Dashboard propagation is still asserted via direct store reads (`dataStore.switcherStore.fetchAllProfiles`) rather than rendered Dashboard indicators/rows. This does not satisfy the feature expectation for view-level rendered active/profile assertions or VAL-CROSS-001/002 UI evidence.
Settings→Popover propagation test also verifies only store contents after reload, not Popover-rendered profile/active indicators. The test remains store-centric rather than actionable UI evidence.

Cross-surface synchronization tests still perform `localStore.setActiveProfile(...)` directly (same at line 1869) instead of executing switch actions from Dashboard/Popover controls. This misses the required UI-action path for VAL-CROSS-009.

Launch-chain assertions remain hypothetical (`"Launch adapter would use ..."`) and only re-check active-profile state (same pattern at line 1996). No browser/CLI launch adapter/service invocation is exercised, so the original launch-path blocker from the prior failed feature is not resolved.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The switcher-ui-worker handoff sets `followedProcedure=true` but omits required context-read command evidence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requirement: `.factory/skills/switcher-ui-worker/SKILL.md` ("Context Read Evidence for followedProcedure=true"). Handoff `verification.commandsRun` only lists xcodebuild tests and no mission/context file-read commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure requires broader validation and manual UI sanity checks, but handoff evidence includes only scoped xcodebuild suites and no interactive checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill procedure steps 6-7 in `.factory/skills/switcher-ui-worker/SKILL.md` require `scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh` and manual sanity checks; handoff `interactiveChecks` is empty and commands do not include the app script.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Workers continue to satisfy cross-surface contracts with store assertions even when contract language asks for action-chain/UI trace evidence, indicating evidence expectations are still being interpreted inconsistently.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `validation-contract.md` VAL-CROSS-001/002/009 evidence calls for end-to-end flow traces and matching UI indicators/cross-surface action chains, but new tests at `SwitcherCrossFlowTests.swift:2043`, `2089`, and `1801`/`1869` assert store state directly.

summary: Review result: fail. This fix meaningfully improves VAL-CROSS-008 by tapping CTAs and asserting callbacks, but it does not yet provide actionable UI-level propagation assertions or real launch-chain invocation evidence, so the original failure is only partially addressed.
